name: Popeye The Sailor Man
description:
I'm Popeye the Sailor Man! toot

I'm Popeye the Sailor Man! toot

I'm strong to the finich,

Cuz I eats my spinach,

I'm Popeye the Sailor Man! toot

I'm one tough Gazookus, what hates all Palookas, what ain't on the up and square.

I biffs 'em and buffs 'em and always outroughs 'em.

And none of 'em gets nowhere.

If anyone dasses to risk my fisk,

It's buff and it's wham unerstan?

So keep good behavor,

It's your one lifesaver,

With Popeye the Sailor Man toot
creator: KingEmperor
